creator: ashafer@badland.io
text:
Do you have any other details on the machine? Specifically I'm curious is this is a hybrid graphics laptop (i.e. is there an intel/AMD GPU in addition to this M2200)?

You should definitely not load any NVIDIA modules in loader.conf. This frequently can cause issues booting if the NVIDIA modules overflow the initial space reserved for kernel modules.

I haven't seen any VT corruption. You are using vt and not sc for your system console right? If you are using sc then it would explain all of these issues.
